extortion.description: Mega Metals is a leading titanium recycling company that prides itself on our unwavering commitment to quality and customer service. This means we place a priority on innovation, trust, and relationships. We operate with utmost integrity and full dedication to delivering quality products and a quality experience - from your first contact with us through completion of your order. We want to grow our business by helping you grow yours.  Phone Number     (602) 258-2000 Jim Nathan    jnathan@megamtls.com     215-537-5200 |860-729-5501President/Buyer Joe Buckmasterjbuckmaster@megamtls.com602-258-6677 |909-380-4725Director of Operations/Quality Size:   20.2 GB (21,736,637,056 bytes)
